categories.title: Decor & Lamps
categories.desc: Authentic hand-carved Himalayan salt lamps in pink and rare white crystal, plus natural salt candles for a warm, purifying ambiance.

categories.title: Wellness & Therapy
categories.desc: Spa-grade Himalayan salt tiles for cooking and halotherapy, and smooth massage stones for deep therapeutic treatments.

categories.title: Gourmet Edible Salts
categories.desc: Premium light pink, dark pink, and black Himalayan salt in coarse, medium, and fine grain sizes for culinary and food industry use.

categories.title: Animal Mineral Salt
categories.desc: 100% natural Himalayan salt licking blocks for horses, cattle, and livestock. Rich in 84+ trace minerals essential for animal health.
